package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_string_handling_byte_string_roundtrip_for_contains: Layer: String handling. Flag string/[]byte roundtrips around Contains/Index checks that have native package variants.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario594Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Contains(haystack, needle)
}
